seo_article.title: About PalabraMaster: The Ultimate Word Game
seo_article.intro: Welcome to PalabraMaster, an addictive puzzle game designed to test your vocabulary and mental agility. In this HTML5 game, your main goal is to form the longest possible words using the available letters on the board. Perfect for casual, fun brain training.
seo_article.instructions: To play, simply swipe or click on adjacent letters to connect them and form valid words. The longer the word, the higher your score. There is no time limit, allowing you to strategically plan your moves to clear the board. The game ends automatically when there are no more possible words left to build. Therefore, if the game hasn't ended yet, it means there is still at least one word waiting to be discovered! If your mind goes blank, you can always tap the 'Hint' button to reveal a playable word in exchange for watching a quick ad.
seo_article.scoring_desc: The key to mastering PalabraMaster is finding the longest words, as the system heavily rewards length:
seo_article.bonus_10: +50 bonus points for 10-letter or longer words.
seo_article.bonus_clearfull: +100 bonus points if you clear the board.
seo_article.conclusion: Enjoy PalabraMaster on any device—mobile, tablet, or desktop. Install our Progressive Web App (PWA) to play offline and keep your progress safe!

guide.title: Master Guide: How to Dominate PalabraMaster
guide.intro_text: PalabraMaster is a cognitive training tool designed to improve lexical retrieval and mental agility. We aim to combine puzzle fun with the intellectual challenge of forming words under pressure.
guide.mechanics_desc: The board features 9 columns of letters acting as a stack. Click top-row letters to move them to the creation zone and build words. The game ends when no more words are possible or if you clear the entire board, earning a 100-point bonus.
guide.scoring_desc: Points are awarded based on word length:
guide.submit_desc: Once a valid word is formed, the 'Submit' button turns green. Click it to remove letters from the board and add points to your total score.
guide.hints_desc: If you are stuck, use the 'Hint' button. The game will highlight possible combinations to help you continue. This feature requires watching a short ad, allowing us to keep the game free.
guide.leaderboard_desc: We maintain independent global rankings for English and Spanish, showing the top 25 players. If you reach the top 25, you can register your nickname and nationality to see your position.
guide.strat_1_desc: Don't exhaust your vowels early; save them for connecting complex consonants or forming long words.
guide.strat_2_desc: Train your eye to spot three-letter patterns before forming the full word.
guide.strat_3_desc: Prioritize clearing the entire board to earn the maximum 100-point bonus.

privacy.title: Privacy and Cookie Policy
privacy.section1_text: At PalabraMaster, we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting our users' data.
privacy.section2_text: PalabraMaster does not require registration or collect personal data directly. All game progress is saved locally.
privacy.section2_subtext: We use third-party services that may collect anonymous information:
privacy.section2_list1: To measure site traffic and performance.
privacy.section2_list2: To show advertisements that fund the maintenance of the game.
privacy.section3_title: 3. Use of Cookies and Google AdSense
privacy.section3_text: Our website uses cookies to improve the user experience and show relevant advertising.
privacy.section3_list1: Third-party vendors use cookies to serve ads based on prior visits.
privacy.section3_list2: Allows serving ads based on browsing behavior.
privacy.section3_list3: You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting the
privacy.section4_text: If you are in the EEA, you have the right to configure the use of non-essential cookies via the consent banner.
privacy.section5_text: If you have any questions, you can contact us by sending an email to:
